The test should verify that a dead cell with only 2 live neighbors does NOT become alive. Use two adjacent cells like [[0,0],[1,0]]. The dead cell (0,1) has 2 live neighbors but should NOT be born. Expected result: [] (both cells die from underpopulation, and no new cells are born because no dead cell has exactly 3 neighbors).

The implementation has the full algorithm. This test will likely PASS immediately.
